name: recipes
description: Plugins for the recipes corpus. Hosted in the app repo itself, so a plugin versions in lockstep with the binary it drives.

plugins.name: recipes-enrich
plugins.description: The corpus enrichment worker: fixed pull -> read -> push loops that read a recipe's ingredient lines into structured measures, its method into a step DAG, and the equipment it requires — using recipe-backend as its only I/O.
